title: Edge Case - Cancel on the last day of trial
description: Test the cancellation flow on the final day of the trial period.
preconditions: User has an active trial with less than 24 hours remaining

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the Trial Corner hub.
2. Verify the 'Remaining Days' copy shows '0 Days' or 'Ends Today'.
3. Proceed with the full cancellation flow.

expected_result: The cancellation is processed successfully, and the user's access is immediately revoked.
